name: Oat Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Coat 12 medium-size muffin cups with vegetable oil or line with paper baking liners.
3. In a large bowl, combine oat bran cereal, chopped nuts, raisins, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add the remaining ingredients; mix just until the dry ingredients are moistened and well combined.
5. Fill each prepared muffin cup almost full.
6. Bake for 15-17 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 14; PRO: 3g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 114; Low-sodium diets: Omit salt.
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton
